blocks.content: Walking back to the locker room. Jonathan fell in step beside me.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: You just talked to her for six minutes.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: I was being informative. I'm part of the practice she's observing.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: No cap though — she had all this detail in there. Like the way I read the coverage before the snap and how my footwork changes. She was actually watching it correctly.
I laughed before I could stop it.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: Okay so where was all that advice you gave me about not being distracted?

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: It was over by like two minutes.
We walked the rest of the way back in silence. But he was smiling. That small smile he only got when something had surprised him.
